name: PFModal
description: Temporary chamber for focused tasks, confirmations, or critical information.
responsibility: Focus attention on a temporary task, confirmation, or critical information.

requirements: Focus must be trapped while the modal is open.
A clear escape path must exist.
Dialog title and purpose must be announced.

composition_rules: Modals must have a clear escape.
Do not use modals for complex workflows unless necessary.
Focus must be trapped inside while open.
anti_patterns: stacking multiple modals without exceptional reason
placing long multistep workflows in a modal by default
